title: Science Grade 4 - Matter and Changes
content: Learners describe changes in materials caused by heating and cooling using familiar household examples.

title: Science Grade 6 - Living Things
content: Learners explain how plants make food and why sunlight, water, air, and chlorophyll are important.

title: Araling Panlipunan - Local Community
content: Lessons should connect concepts to learners' barangay, family roles, local livelihood, and community practices.
